financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made more money than ever before and paid off a lot of its debt.
They have extra cash to use, but they haven't shared their plans for the future yet.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but new tariffs on car exports could hurt profits.
Currency changes helped profits recently, but future shifts could be risky without a clear plan.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well in managing its environmental impact and leadership practices.
There is room for improvement in how the company handles social issues like employee and community relations.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial performance and future plans.
Even though there are challenges outside, they are focused on growing and managing their money well.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some clear numbers but avoided giving full details on future plans.
They answered most questions with data, but some important topics were not fully addressed.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well with high earnings and cash, but they are careful about future predictions due to economic uncertainties.
Their electric vehicle business is profitable and they're cutting costs, but they face challenges in China and haven't shared future earnings plans.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Tata Motors is doing well financially, making more money than before and reducing its debt significantly.
The company is investing a lot in future growth, but global challenges and competition could affect its performance.
